<Meta of={VideoEmbedStories} name="Overview" />

# Video Embed

The video embed component provides a responsive container for embedded videos from platforms like YouTube, Vimeo, and other iframe-based video sources. It maintains proper aspect ratios and ensures videos are accessible and performant.

## Interactive Preview

Use the controls panel below to see the video embed component in action.

<Canvas of={VideoEmbedStories.videoEmbed} />

## Properties

### Required Properties

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Property</th>
      <th>Type</th>
      <th>Description</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>
        <code>video_embed__url</code>
      </td>
      <td>
        <code>string</code>
      </td>
      <td>Video embed URL (iframe src)</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### Optional Properties

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Property</th>
      <th>Type</th>
      <th>Default</th>
      <th>Description</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>
        <code>video_embed__title</code>
      </td>
      <td>
        <code>string</code>
      </td>
      <td>-</td>
      <td>Accessible title for the video iframe</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>
        <code>video_embed__aspect_ratio</code>
      </td>
      <td>
        <code>string</code>
      </td>
      <td>
        <code>'16:9'</code>
      </td>
      <td>Video aspect ratio (16:9, 4:3, 1:1)</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Supported Video Platforms

The video embed component works with any iframe-based video platform, including:

- **YouTube**: Standard and privacy-enhanced embeds
- **Vimeo**: Public and private videos
- **Kaltura**: Enterprise video platform
- **Wistia**: Business video hosting
- **Custom Players**: Any iframe-embeddable video player

## Aspect Ratios

The component supports standard video aspect ratios:

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Ratio</th>
      <th>Description</th>
      <th>Common Use</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>
        <code>16:9</code>
      </td>
      <td>Widescreen format (default)</td>
      <td>Modern videos, YouTube, most web content</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>
        <code>4:3</code>
      </td>
      <td>Classic format</td>
      <td>Older videos, presentations</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>
        <code>1:1</code>
      </td>
      <td>Square format</td>
      <td>Social media videos</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Technical Specifications

- **Atomic Level**: Atom
- **Template**: `yds-video-embed.twig`
- **Styles**: `cl-video-embed.scss`

### Accessibility

- **Title Attribute**: All iframes must have a descriptive title
- **Keyboard Navigation**: Embedded players are keyboard accessible
- **Captions**: Ensure embedded videos have captions/subtitles available
- **Transcripts**: Provide transcripts for important video content
- **Skip Links**: Consider skip links for multiple embedded videos
- **Focus Management**: Embedded players maintain focus indicators

### Responsive Behavior

- **Fluid Sizing**: Videos scale to container width
- **Aspect Ratio**: Maintains proportions across all viewport sizes
- **Mobile Friendly**: Touch controls work properly on mobile devices
- **Performance**: Uses lazy loading when appropriate

### Performance

- **Lazy Loading**: Iframes can be lazy-loaded for better page performance
- **Facade Pattern**: Consider loading a thumbnail first for better LCP
- **Connection**: Videos don't load until necessary, saving bandwidth
- **Third-party Scripts**: Minimize impact of external player scripts

## Usage Guidelines

### Best Practices

- Always provide a descriptive title for the iframe
- Use 16:9 aspect ratio for modern web videos
- Enable captions/subtitles in the video platform
- Provide a transcript or summary for accessibility
- Test keyboard navigation through embedded player controls
- Use privacy-enhanced embed URLs when available (YouTube: youtube-nocookie.com)
- Consider lazy loading for pages with multiple videos
- Ensure video platform is GDPR/privacy compliant if required

### Things to Avoid

- Don't autoplay videos with sound (violates accessibility guidelines)
- Avoid embedding videos without descriptive titles
- Don't embed very large videos on pages that should load quickly
- Avoid platforms that don't support captions/subtitles
- Don't use deprecated embed codes
- Avoid inline styles on embed codes
- Don't forget to test embedded videos on mobile devices

## Implementation Notes

### Basic Video Embed

```twig
{{ include('@atoms/videos/video-embed/yds-video-embed.twig', {
  video_embed__url: 'https://www.youtube.com/embed/dQw4w9WgXcQ',
  video_embed__title: 'Video Title for Accessibility',
  video_embed__aspect_ratio: '16:9'
}) }}
```

### YouTube Privacy-Enhanced Mode

Use `youtube-nocookie.com` domain for privacy-enhanced embeds:

```
https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VIDEO_ID
```

### Lazy Loading

Add loading attribute to iframe for better performance:

```html
<iframe loading="lazy" src="..." title="..."></iframe>
```

### Facade Pattern

For critical performance pages, consider implementing a facade pattern:

1. Show video thumbnail as placeholder
2. Load actual iframe on user click
3. Improves initial page load performance

### Video Parameters

Common parameters for video platforms:

**YouTube:**

- `autoplay=1` - Autoplay video (use carefully)
- `controls=0` - Hide video controls
- `modestbranding=1` - Minimize YouTube branding
- `rel=0` - Don't show related videos

**Vimeo:**

- `autoplay=1` - Autoplay video
- `loop=1` - Loop video
- `title=0` - Hide video title
- `byline=0` - Hide video author

## Accessibility Considerations

### Video Captions

All embedded videos should have captions available:

- Enable captions in the video platform
- Provide accurate, synchronized captions
- Support multiple languages when possible

### Transcripts

Provide text transcripts for:

- Important instructional content
- Lectures and presentations
- Videos with dialogue or narration
- Legal or compliance content

### Autoplay Guidelines

- Never autoplay videos with sound
- Use autoplay sparingly, only when expected
- Provide pause/stop controls prominently
- Consider motion sensitivity (WCAG 2.1)

## Testing

For comprehensive visual regression testing with all video embed variations and theme combinations, see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/atoms-videos-video-embed-visreg).
